title: Rural Grid Hardening Initiative

summary: Implemented mold, ventilation, and asthma-trigger interventions in aging public housing stock.

summary: Combined shoulder widening, lighting, and community speed interventions on high-risk corridors.
relevanceNote: Useful for evidence-backed crash reduction narratives.
